description: Phase 12.10 — GSC Indexing Action Plan (DRAFT — not executed)
safety: NO ACTIONS EXECUTED — all items require manual approval

actions.action: Identify + fix the 1 'Duplicate Google chose different canonical' URL
actions.steps: 1. Qasem identifies the URL in GSC. 2. Inspect page's canonical tag. 3. Compare content with the page Google chose. 4. Fix canonical OR make content more distinct.

actions.action: Improve internal linking from hub pages to core calculators and important uncrawled pages
actions.steps: Add internal links from homepage to top calculators. Ensure blog posts link to relevant calculators. Add breadcrumb navigation. These signal crawl priority to Google.

actions.action: Request recrawl of top 20 most important uncrawled pages via GSC URL Inspection
actions.steps: Qasem manually submits top 20 important pages (core calculators, key blog posts) in GSC URL Inspection tool and requests indexing.

actions.action: Qasem exports 100+ 'Discovered not indexed' URLs from GSC for classification
actions.steps: From GSC web interface → Indexing → Pages → 'Discovered — currently not indexed' → export sample. Identify which are important pages vs cleanup lag.

actions.action: Verify sitemap.xml freshness — ensure lastmod dates are accurate for important pages
actions.steps: Check sitemap.xml generation code. Ensure important pages have recent lastmod dates to signal freshness to Google.

actions.action: Monitor 'Crawled not indexed' — Qasem exports the 15 URLs from GSC
actions.steps: Qasem inspects the 15 URLs in GSC. If any are important pages, improve content. If all are thin/noindexed, no action needed.

actions.action: Verify the 4 'Alternative page with proper canonical' URLs
actions.steps: Qasem exports the 4 URLs from GSC. Confirm they are formula variants with proper canonicals to parent calculators.
Qasem exports from GSC. Confirm the redirect destination is correct.

actions.action: No action for cleanup lag URLs (~2,972)
actions.steps: The 2,059 scenario pages, 588 geo pages, and 384 formula variants were intentionally noindexed. These will drop out of 'Discovered not indexed' over 2-4 weeks as Google re-crawls and confirms noindex.
